Article.ArticleTitle: Interventions supporting cognitive recovery after surgery: a scoping review.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Neurobiology, Care Sciences and Society, Karolinska Institutet, Alfred Nobels Allé 23, C3 | 141 83, Huddinge, Sweden. amina.guenna.holmgren@ki.se.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethical approval: Not applicable. Consent for publication: Not applicable. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
